# I AM THE CHANGE ## Scholarship Program — Home Visit Questionnaire Team Everest | Confidential **Volunteer Name:** M. Mohammed Riaz **Co-Volunteer Name:** Harini Mohan **Date of Visit:** 05/07/2026 ## Section 1 — Student Profile ### 1.1. Application ID Enter Application ID TEMP - 2026 - 8944 ### 1.2. Student Full Name Enter full name Bimal. S ### 1.3. Gender ☒ Male☐ Female☐ Others ## Section 2 — Family Background ### 2.1. Family Status ☐ Single Parent☐ Parentless☒ Having both parents ### 2.2. Relationship Details (if applicable) | Year of Death / Separation | Reason for Death / Separation | |----------------------------|-------------------------------| | — NA — | | | | | ### 2.3. Is Father/ Mother photograph kept at home? ☒ Yes ☐ No ### 2.4. Government ID Verified (Ration Card / Aadhaar / Driving Licence / Voter ID) ☒ Aadhaar Card ☐ Ration Card ☐ Driving Licence ☐ Voter ID ☐ Other: ### 2.5. Family Members | Name | Age | Education | Occupation | Annual Income | |-----------|-----|-------------|-------------|---------------| | A. Suresh | 49 | X | Lorry Driver| Rs. 1.08 Lakh | | S. Ambika | 42 | VIII | Tailoring | Rs. 72000/- | | S. Kamal | 20 | B.E
IV year | Student | NA | | | | | | | --- Page 2 --- ## Section 3 — Housing Condition ### 3.1. House Ownership ☒ Own ☐ Rented #### --- Page 2 --- 3.1.1 If rented, what is the rent amount? Rent amount — NA — ### 3.2. Type of Home ☐ Individual ☐ Private Apartment ☒ Housing Board ☐ Line House ☐ Others: ### 3.3. Type of Ceiling - ☐ Roof (Kurai) ☐ Tiled ☐ Asbestos / Sheet ☒ Concrete ### 3.4. Number of Bedrooms Enter number Single room (hall cum room) ### 3.4.1 Type of Bedroom - ☐ Separate Bedroom ☒ No Separate Bedroom ### 3.5. Bathroom - ☒ Separate ☐ Common for Apartment ### 3.6. Kitchen Type - ☐ Separate Kitchen ☒ Hall with Kitchen --- Page 3 --- ## Section 4 — Financial Background ### 4.1. Assets at Home (tick all that apply) - ☒ Washing Machine ☒ Fridge ☒ AC ☒ LED TV ☒ Two-Wheeler ☐ Car - ☒ Smartphone ☐ Separate Wi-Fi ☐ Others: ### 4.2. Amount of Last Electricity Bill Amount in ₹ Rs. 700/- for 2 months ### 4.3. Do you own any other assets/properties in the name of grandparents, parents, or student? - ☐ Yes ☒ No 4.3.1 If yes, list their properties: | Property Description | Owner Name | Approximate Value | |----------------------|------------|-------------------| | — NA — | | | | | | | ### 4.4. Apart from your job, is there any other source of income? ☐ Yes ☒ No 4.4.1 If yes, list other sources of income: | Source of Income | Amount | |------------------|--------| | — | | | | | ### 4.5. Income Type ☐ Monthly ☒ Daily ☐ Weekly ☐ Ad-Hoc ### 4.6. Do you have any loans? ☒ Yes ☐ No 4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount: | Sr. No. | Loan Purpose | Loan Amount Taken | Pending Loan Amount | |---------|---------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|---------------------| | 1. | Gold loan
IOB & Federal
Bnk
(obtained for medical treatment) | 10 Lakh | 10 Lakh | | | | | | ### 4.7. If you choose any college, how much is the college fee? Amount in ₹ Rs. 1.50 Lakh per year ### 4.8. If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it? By obtaining loans ### 4.9. If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees? By raising funds / loans from relatives --- Page 5 --- # Section 5 — Health Information 5.1. Does the student have any health issues? ☒ Yes ☐ No 5.2. If yes, list the health issues: Describe health issues Wheezing issue # Section 6 — Student Commitment 6.1. Will you study college for three years without any obstacle? Yes 6.2. If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come? ☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Maybe 6.3. Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)? ☒ Yes ☐ No --- Page 6 --- # Section 7 — Scholarship Information 7.1. Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree? NIL # Section 8 — Volunteer Observation 8.1. What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition? The applicant is a highly studious individual from an economically weaker background. The family faces severe financial strain as the father works as a lorry driver, earning is very low & unpredictable. To support the household, the mother undertakes petty tailoring work from home. 8.2. Will you recommend this student for this scholarship? ☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Not Sure 8.3. Any other comments you want to share? The family is already managing high cost of the candidate's elder brother engineering course. Displaced by hardships, they are currently living in Tsunami Rehabilitation Flats by Tamilnadu Housing board. This student warrants highly favourable consideration for financial aid. Volunteer Signature ![Handwritten signature of the volunteer](b4eeff342f60cc7bcd67d869b4fedca2_img.jpg) Co-Volunteer Signature ![Handwritten signature of the co-volunteer](3342c215b2a8b663596a81468d5dc314_img.jpg)
